programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1

programme.title: Smurfs

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: Superbowl champion Victor Cruz and professional stuntwoman and “American Ninja Warrior” star Jessie Graff return along with four other top competitors for one last shot at redemption. The contenders must face off in a brand-new three-way battle before advancing to a classic head-to-head competition. The last competitors standing must defeat the reigning Titans on Mt. Olympus to advance to the championship round. Dwayne Johnson serves as Host while Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Eastern Region as new competitors push their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In this episode, competitors will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The top female competitor will face Olympic gold-medal winning snowboarder Hannah Teter, while the top man will advance to compete against five-time UFC champion Tyron Woodley. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host Dwayne Johnson. In these Eastern division battles we see Michelle Lewis go up against Dasha Kuret and Andrew Hanus take on Ryan Seenberg. They will compete on obstacles such as Launch Pad, Chain Linked, Kick Out and Over the Edge. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.desc: With the future at stake, Douxie and Claire cling to the hope that Arthur and Morgana can reconcile. Meanwhile, humans are hunting trolls in the woods.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Merlin leads his ragtag crew on a quest to restore Excalibur and save Camelot. Elsewhere, Jim tries to convince Blinky that they're on the same side.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Allura and Lance walk in on Shiro, Pidge, Hunk, and Coran playing a magical role-playing board game

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Amber announces that math is the new skill that every hunter must have. Grug cannot seems to grasp the concept and enlists Squawk to help him/Grug and Snoot ban dancing when it causes a rock slide. Eep sets up an underground dance club against the adults' wishes.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Ugga's new surprise attack fails, and she comes home in a bad mood, Thunk tries to cure it by finding a happy surprise for his mom/ Eep stays up all night to see the mysterious and rare Night Mare (a horse with a rainbow mane) when she's teased for thinking they're not real.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: On their first day at Palomino Bluffs, the girls are determined to make a good impression. Cue the beachfront race — and a daring rescue!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The PALs run into their old rivals the BUDs on the first day of classes, prompting Lucky to run for class rep. Elsewhere, Abigail helps solve a mystery.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty, Revvit and the crew save a band of Woodland Reptools from an evil and destructive Sawmetradon named Splitter who refuses to join the Trux team.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Fang Decay Why is Thatch acting meaner than usual? He has a fang-ache! Scare Day Mantha is determined to become the first zombie ever to win the Super Boo?Scare School's ultimate scaring competition.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Disarmed and Dangerous When Mantha's arm falls off, her replacement limb turns out to be a monstrous tentacle! Frankenleftovers Casper gets a seemingly impossible class assignment—to create life!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and his friends chase all over Nutwood when Ping Pong's spell accidentaly makes his scooter run away.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Undersea adventures when Rupert, Bill and Ping Pong have to rescue Miranda the Mermaid from the clutches of a Giant Clam.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita prepare for the annual Meow-Mazing Games, they encounter stiff competition from the Doodads and must work together to bring home the coveted dollhouse trophy.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to “Best Fans Day” at NY’s Giraffe Stadium, where Alex gets caught up in the attention of rooting for the winning team. When his behavior ends up hurting Marty’s feelings, Alex comes to learn that the only team that matters is the one that’s made up of his friends.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Mr. Tanaka is moving places all by himself, so Team Zenko step in to assist, and learn the importance of asking people for help. / When Sam's skateboard competition falls on the same day as her favourite creator Ken KaBlam's comic book signing, TZG secretly prevents him leaving town before she gets the chance to meet him.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When Po and the kids stop for the night at an Inn, they meet a gang who wants to fight Po and end up down a path to uncovering Jindiao's evil plan

programme.title: Yumi's Cells 3
programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: In the definitive guide, miners reveal exactly where to find gold all over the world, from creeks to glaciers and even on beaches.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Tony blows up at Mike to get the trommel running. Two of Rick’s crew face off while trying to dig out Valhalla. Kevin leans on Buzz to get more gold.

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: When a man is killed on camera outside an Atlanta hotel, police use license plate readers to solve the mystery. Texas police use a tiny detail to track robbers down.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures (S13)
programme.desc: The crew investigates a family-owned pizzeria in Magna, UT, that's been cursed by an evil witch.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective (S4)
programme.desc: After multiple homicides occur along Virginia's Colonial Parkway, Authorities task Det. Danny Plott with finding a serial killer.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (Season 18b) (S18)
programme.desc: Mike surprises Elvis with a Caterham Seven, but the size of the restoration job is bigger than expected. Can they get it race-worthy in time?

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S8)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S8)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Jaws Vs Mega Croc
programme.desc: Using data from new experiments, experts construct a CGI fight to the death between two apex predators: the great white shark and Nile crocodile.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: Joe sets off on a mission to locate his new partner, who is on an uninhabited island off the coast of Panama.

programme.title: Shark Week: Jaws Vs The Meg
programme.desc: The massive meg shark was once feared as the most fearsome predator. But new evidence suggests that its cousin, the great white shark, may have caused its extinction.

programme.title: General History Of China (S1)
programme.desc: Marco Polo was a traveler and businessman in Venice in the 13th century.

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: Mike trades a classic Citroen for an F-Type Jag. Later, he visits a classic car auction to test the market and tries his hand at Crown Green Bowls.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: At a hoard Matt's been circling for years, a genius inventor's pinball and jukebox collection could bring big sales -- but only if it's intact.

programme.title: Fritz Meinecke - Facing The Unknown (S1)
programme.desc: Adventurer Fritz Meineck ventures into remote regions of the world to complete seemingly impossible challenges, with no outside help and limited equipment.

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: When a man is killed on camera outside an Atlanta hotel, police use license plate readers to solve the mystery. Texas police use a tiny detail to track robbers down.

programme.desc: A widowed, eligible father is being pursued by three women to be his new wife but what they don't realise is that to win his heart, they will have to convince his daughter first.

programme.title: Anggun Mikayla - EP 1

programme.title: Sumandak Takes Borneo - EP 10

programme.title: Seoul Cinta - EP 13

programme.title: Mentua - EP 4
programme.desc: Azizah schemes to create distance between Emilia and Azim by using Sofea to undermine Emilia at her own wedding reception. Meanwhile, her husband, Husin, is increasingly tempted by Emilia's best friend, Lidya.

programme.title: Tali dan Tangga - EP 4
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating journey through the world of Snakes & Ladders like never before! Participants will enjoy a jazzed-up version of the beloved Snakes and Ladders game, adding excitement and nostalgia to the experience. Trivia questions woven into the game provide an opportunity for learning while playing, making it a fun and enriching experience for all. Players have the chance to win interesting prizes strategically placed on the game board, adding an extra layer of excitement.
